**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY****WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, OCTOBER 6TH** **_A Note From Jeanie_** **Dear Derek,****
****Last Saturday the NH Republican State Committee hosted its RED Summit at Saint Anselm College. It was a standing room only event and a great success!********Our keynote speakers were fabulous and included Governor John H. Sununu, Corey Lewandowski, and Mitzi Perdue. The educational sessions were information-packed and really provided some “nuts and bolts” information on how to get ready for the 2018 election cycle. Speakers included David Carney (principal of Norway Hill), Lauren Zelt (FP1 Strategies), and RNC staffers Ashley Walukevich and Kelly Kundinger.********[Also in the house and opening up our session was Governor Chris Sununu, who really set the tone for the day.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyAIFNmz-2BSCD7X0Xpy-2BMqeKyphMt4-2Fu0JVMI9VQ3i5SHMpx9OVgeTAZL7SDnDAo15Nw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mjo1rJRPc1ZNL8QIQFLxdTMcr-2BsPvVmFAeTv-2BtcVIbzHkHvX5PbJYf-2F1pLmhRDFC-2B-2FgDFNRSeN2aB8isVhjjVzfMzTX8jBmA2VeEojczfI4L9-2FiZ0XtY1VpBMelxYZ70OwmQf8fKG1JYVwKaSX7O4484LSGfgOCWdebaeSYb3RjmiYpvGSbR9Sb2IRUd-2BKh1TJ1y88y6eVyfyadtBaJgdQjj7VyKuTw5xPGZh4wBQihR5jChkrvDjqvTQ5XfWZwCSqnzWEeXez5hsJzIxmbwBpA-3D-3D) The message is this – Republicans are in charge in New Hampshire and Republicans are leading!********We are NH Republicans—Republicans who know how to work together and get things done.********If you weren’t able to attend, please watch for our RED Summit 2018 Candidates Session in the Spring, which will focus on recruitment and training for candidates in the 2018 cycle.**
**Sincerely, **
**Jeanie** **Join the Grassroots Circle!**

name: DWS
subject: Here's how you can help Puerto Rico
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends, Our friends and fellow Americans in Puerto Rico are facing one of the most pressing humanitarian crises in recent history. Hurricane Maria has devastated Puerto Rico and the Virgin Islands, leaving millions without food, water, power, medicine, and fuel. Relief efforts will last well into 2018 as many families try to piece together what's left. What makes our country great is that each time our fellow brothers and sisters get knocked down, we step up and extend a helping hand to them. Right now, the people of Puerto Rico and others throughout the Caribbean need our help. [_**Please, if you can, find out how you can make a difference and help those affected by Hurricane Maria.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0e/622b7b5b/67c27aa/307bd3c5/3241120579/VEsH/ "http://www.pbs.org/newshour/rundown/can-help-hurricane-victims-puerto-rico/") | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0e/622b7b5b/67c27aa/307bd3c5/3241120579/VEsE/ "http://www.pbs.org/newshour/rundown/can-help-hurricane-victims-puerto-rico/")
---
I appreciated all that you did to help our friends and family in Florida, Texas, and Louisiana when they needed support. Now, I'm asking if you will help the people of Puerto Rico and those throughout the Caribbean who have lost so much.
Thank you so much for stepping up and helping our friends in Puerto Rico,
Debbie

Republicans are calling it a "tax plan" -- but it's really just a plan to give massive payouts to millionaires and billionaires. Stand with Senate Democrats to fight back >>
---
**[](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954ded3/2b07114c/ef37e369/731512a9/3461297532/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-cuts-to-medicare?source=PT-20171007-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")**
_**POLITICO: Senate Republicans are proposing to slash Medicare spending by $473 billion over a decade**_
Team --

Republicans are calling their new tax plan "reform" \-- but it's really just a plan to give massive payouts to millionaires and billionaires. And they plan to pay for it with drastic cuts to Medicare and Medicaid...to the tune of hundreds of billions of dollars over a decade.

Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell can't wait to pass this tax plan, but our Senate Democrats are standing together to save Medicare and Medicaid -- and they need our support. There is too much at stake for us to sit on the sidelines.

[**Add your name to tell Republicans: NO cuts to Medicare and Medicaid to pay for tax breaks for the wealthy.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954ded3/2b07114c/ef37e369/731512a9/3461297532/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-cuts-to-medicare?source=PT-20171007-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

As the _Washington Post_ reported this week, after failing to gut Medicaid by repealing Obamacare, Republicans are "taking another whack as part of a tax code rewrite."

While Trump travels the country telling the American people that they will be the "biggest winners" of the GOP's tax reform efforts, we can't be fooled: the reality is that their plan would badly hurt the millions of Americans who rely on Medicare and Medicaid.

The hundreds of billions of dollars in Medicare and Medicaid cuts will mean seniors, low-income folks and people with disabilities will struggle to get the care they need.

[**It 's critical that we stand with Senate Democrats right now to show our opposition to the GOP's disastrous tax plan. Will you add your name today?**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954ded3/2b07114c/ef37e369/731512a9/3461297532/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-cuts-to-medicare?source=PT-20171007-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner -- we have you. And every gift you give the DSCC is a gift we use to propel our Senate candidates to victory.

body:
Friend,

Under today's current tax system, too many American families are forced to live paycheck to paycheck. Why? Because their take-home pay is crippled by unfair and unnecessary taxes.

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Protecting access to birth control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello --
President Trump just rolled back an Affordable Care Act requirement that employers include birth control coverage in their health insurance plans. Thanks to this provision, more than 55 million women across America have access to birth control coverage with no out-of-pocket cost.
Rolling back coverage for birth control is a blatant, direct attack on women's access to health care and on their right to make their own health care decisions. That's why I'm launching a petition to fight back against this decision, and I'm hoping that you'll join me in signing it.
[**Please, put your name down to tell the Trump administration to protect women 's access to birth control and health care.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde7e/2a380d31/1d1a65cd/fe001b/319615013/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20171005_ProtectBirthControl?source=e20171007_birthcontrol_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Nine out of ten women of reproductive age will use contraception at some point in their lives. _Nine out of ten._
And since this benefit went into effect, women across the country have saved $1.4 billion on birth control.
Taking away this benefit undermines women's access to important health services, and it's critical that we all speak out against it.
I will continue fighting against these attacks and work to ensure that all women have access to the essential preventative health services they need, but it's imperative that you stand with me.
[**Please, put your name down to recommit to the fight to protect access to birth control and affordable, accessible women's health care.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde7e/2a380d31/1d1a65cd/fe001b/319615013/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20171005_ProtectBirthControl?source=e20171007_birthcontrol_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for speaking out.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
